title: Crocodile Is Driven Back
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on the royal tomb and the poneglyph. Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...Now then, I should get going too.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: But I saw him flying that way!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna let him get away!

summary: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
